Introduction to machine learning with pipes and machine learning has become an integral part of many commercial application and research project, but this field is not exclusive to large companies with extensive research teams. If you use Python even as a beginner, this book will touch you practical ways to build your own machine learning solution. With all the data available today, machine learning application are limited only by your imagination. Table of Content Introduction Supervised learning unsupervised learning and pre processing representing data and engineering feature model evolution and improving improvement algorithm change and pipelines working with text data wrapping up so who should read this book? This book is for current machine learning participate starts looking as a implement solution to real world machine learning problems. This is an introductory introductory book require more previous knowledge of machine learning or artificial intelligence AI. We focus on using Python, the script and library and work through all the steps to create a successful machine learning application.
